chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1208 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.4878/2022. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.4879/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 07.04.2022 Mr. Muhammad Sajjad Soomro, Advocate for the petitioner. == 1. Urgency is granted. 2to4. At the very outset, it is stated by learned counsel for the petitioner that he would not press the disposal of instant petition before this Court on merits provided that the petitioner is permitted to exhaust her remedy before any other forum in accordance with law. Instant petition is dismissed as withdrawn. The petitioner however may exhaust her remedy before any other forum if it is permitted by law. J U D G E J U D G E Muhammad Danish* 2 Urgency is granted. The petitioner, by preferring instant petition in year 2022 has sought for direction against the respondents to appoint her in Education & Literacy Department Government of Sindh on deceased quota basis for the reason that her father being clerk in above said Department died in year 2006 during service. The petitioner became entitled to be appointed in civil service in year 2010, on attaining majority. Whey she slept over her cause for about 12 years? No plausible explanation to such delay is offered by her. Consequently, the instant petition being hit by laches miserably is dismissed in limine together with listed application.
